rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. JOHN A. PHILLIPS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 07, 2014 line 3. PLAINTIFF'S BANK OF AMERICA Anti-Slapp Motion Pursuant To Ccp 425.16. Plaintiff's Anti-SLAPP Motion pursuant to CCP 425.16 is continued to February 5, 2014. Cross-Defendant may submit a supplemental reply to cross-complainant's supplemental opposition filed on December 18, 2013 no later than January 24, 2014 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SARAH LEWIS VS. AMY MAR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defts To Comply With Pltf'S Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, (Set One) And Fro A Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 07, 2014 line 4. PLAINTIFF'S SARAH LEWIS Motion To Compel Defendants To Comply With Plainttif's Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, (Set One) And For A Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Defendant's to Comply with Demand for Production is GRANTED. Within 10 days of notice of entry of order Defendant must (1) produce all documents responsive to requests 11-13 leaving the title of the document unredacted (i.e. state, local or federal return) and/or specifying which returns have not been filed/cannot be obtained; (2) respond to requests 17,18, 27 in accordance with CCP 2031.230; and (3) produce documents responsive to request 16 and 17 with all information redacted, including the name of the financial institution, except for defendant's name, address, and date of the statement. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,845 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN GERAGHTY VS. JOSEPH SHALIZI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 07, 2014 line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT'S BRIAN GERAGHTY DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. Cross-Defendant's Demurrer to Cross-Complaint is continued to February 7, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of cross-complaint to department 501 no later than January 17, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. DAVID HUNTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Award Of Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 07, 2014 line 6. DEFENDANTS' DAVID HUNTER, DARRELL HUNTER AND CHARLES HUNTER Motion For Award Of Attorney's Fees. Defendants' Motion for Award of Attorney's Fees is GRANTED. Unlawful detainer is based, at least in part, on alleged commission of "nuisance under state law," i.e. tort. Defendant shall recover $1,500 in attorney's fees and $780.72 in costs per Memorandum of Costs. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHERELL HALLETT VS. SAGRARIO MEDINA et al

rulings.Case Title: URAVI, LLC DBA ROYAL INN VS. ROLEN HECKNER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 07, 2014 line 13. PLAINTIFF'S URAVI Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery, Establish Admissions is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall serve responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $810 to be paid with 5 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)
